keywords.label: Keywords
keywords.text: enhanced, pilot, monitoring, communication, human-machine interaction

abstract.label: Abstract
abstract.text: Project aims to develop and validate potential advancements in the ability of autonomous systems to sense changes in pilot communications as a result of changes in workload and related conditions, such as stress and fatigue. Such advancements can be used to improve pilot communications and human-machine interactions.

team_members.label: Team members
team_members.text: Zemcik Pavel, prof. Dr. Ing., dr. h. c. (DCGM) – research leader Cernocky Jan, prof. Dr. Ing. (DCGM) Odehnal Ondrej, Ing. (DCGM) Otahalova Sylva (DCGM) Plchot Oldrich, Ing., Ph.D. (DCGM) Szoke Igor, Ing., Ph.D. (DCGM)
